SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.tests

Class GossipMessageTest

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.tests.GossipMessageTest
public class GossipMessageTest extends Object
Unit tests for the gossip message hierarchy (AbstractGossipMessage and its concrete subclasses).

These tests validate the three contracts every gossip message must satisfy, regardless of payload :

  1. Constructor preserves every payload field unchanged (no silent munging).
  2. GossipMessageI.copyWithNewEmitterURI(String) returns an instance of the same concrete subclass, with the new emitter URI, and the original gossipMessageURI + timestamp preserved (key invariants for skip-echo + atomic dedup, cf. docs/GOSSIP.md §3 §4).
  3. Each concrete subclass implements EmitterAwareGossipMessageI, inherited transitively via AbstractGossipMessage, so the broker can rely on it defensively (no instanceof chain).

The gossipMessageURI of every distinct in-flight message is also asserted unique within the test suite — this is the property the broker's atomic dedup depends on.

Author:
Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa
